Vulnerabilities.Title: Little CMS: lcms2: mm2/Little-CMS: Little CMS: Information disclosure or denial of service via integer overflow in CubeSize
Vulnerabilities.Description: Little CMS (lcms2) through 2.18 has an integer overflow in CubeSize in cmslut.c because the overflow check is performed after the multiplication.

ExperimentalModifiedFindings.Statement: Wait for upstream fix in debian

Finding.Title: libexpat: libexpat: Information disclosure and data integrity issues due to integer overflow in buffer reallocation
Finding.Description: In libexpat before 2.7.4, the doContent function does not properly determine the buffer size bufSize because there is no integer overflow check for tag buffer reallocation.

ExperimentalModifiedFindings.Statement: Wait for upstream fix in spring boot

Finding.Title: Jackson Core: Document length constraint bypass in blocking, async, and DataInput parsers
